cafresohq_frontend.build: echo 'NOTE: run `npm --prefix frontend run build` before `dfx deploy`'

cafreso_pages.//: cafreso.com deployment. Serves the SAME unified frontend/build as cafresohq_frontend (v4tdv), but to the legacy Pages canister dqcmv-… that cafreso.com's custom domain points at (we control it; `default` is a controller). Deploy with: npm --prefix frontend run build && dfx deploy cafreso_pages --network ic --identity default. Kept until cafreso.com is consolidated onto a single canister (see docs/strategy/07-pages-cafresohq-merge.md).
cafreso_pages.build: echo 'NOTE: run `npm --prefix frontend run build` before `dfx deploy`'

cafresohq_ui.//: The HQ app UI (hq.html + jsx + css + assets), served from ICP so UI updates are a ~1-min dfx deploy instead of a container rebuild. serve.py becomes API-only; this UI calls it cross-origin (?api=<base>). build_hq_ui.py assembles hq-ui/ from the repo-root UI files.

cafresohq_state.//: Phase 2: on-chain per-user state (HQ docs + vetKeys-encrypted vault ciphertext), keyed by II principal. Browser is the only caller; makes the OCI container stateless. See docs/PHASE2_STATE_CANISTER.md.
